etymology.description: 大(大) (dà, "big") + 陆(陸) (lù, "land") combine to imply a large mass of land, thus conveying the sense of 'mainland'.
etymology.interpretation: 大(大) (dà, "big") implies something large or extensive. 陆(陸) (lù, "land") specifically denotes ground or earth. Together, these characters create the image of a vast expanse of land, which naturally leads to the concept of the 'mainland' as opposed to islands or smaller landforms.

examples.chinese: 中国大陆(中國大陸)的人口很多。
examples.pinyin: Zhōngguó dàlù de rénkǒu hěn duō.
examples.english: The population of the Chinese mainland is very large.

examples.chinese: 我想去大陆旅行(我想去大陸旅行)。
examples.english: I want to travel to the mainland.

examples.chinese: 大陆的文化多样(大陸的文化多樣)，非常有趣(非常有趣)。
examples.pinyin: Dàlù de wénhuà duōyàng, fēicháng yǒuqù.
examples.english: The culture of the mainland is diverse and very interesting.
